assertions.title: Local-process runner executes tasks without Docker

steps.expected: All tests pass covering basic execution, stdout/stderr capture, exit codes, working directory, result parsing, harness integration
steps.observed: 40 tests passed in 2.74s. All TestBasicExecution (7 tests), TestResultParsing (5 tests), TestWorkingDirectory (4 tests), TestInterfaceCompliance (4 tests), TestHarnessIntegration (2 tests) passed.

steps.action: Verify echo 'success' produces TaskResult with status=SUCCESS
steps.observed: test_echo_success_produces_taskresult_success PASSED: runner.run_task(command='echo success') returns TaskResult(status=SUCCESS, score=1.0, task_id=test-local-001)

steps.action: Verify same interface as Docker runner
steps.expected: LocalRunner is BaseEnvironment subclass with prepare/execute/cleanup methods returning ExecutionOutput
steps.observed: test_is_base_environment_subclass PASSED: LocalRunner inherits from BaseEnvironment. test_can_be_used_with_base_harness PASSED: LocalRunner works with LocalHarness.

steps.expected: stdout, stderr captured independently; exit codes correct (0, 1, 42)
steps.observed: 7 TestBasicExecution tests all PASSED: stdout capture, stderr capture, both channels, nonzero exit (42), exit 1, empty output, unicode

relevantTestClasses: TestInterfaceCompliance (4 tests) — BaseEnvironment subclass with correct interface
TestHarnessIntegration (2 tests) — same interface as Docker runner, echo success → SUCCESS

assertions.title: Local runner respects timeout and signal handling

steps.expected: All 6 timeout tests pass covering SIGTERM/SIGKILL, partial output, timed_out flag

steps.action: Verify timeout marks timed_out=True with sleep 60 and short timeout
steps.observed: test_timeout_marks_timed_out_true PASSED: sleep 60 with timeout=0.5 → timed_out=True

steps.action: Verify partial output captured on timeout
steps.expected: stdout contains 'partial' even though process timed out
steps.observed: test_timeout_captures_partial_output PASSED: 'echo partial && sleep 60' with timeout=0.5 → timed_out=True, 'partial' in stdout

steps.action: Verify SIGTERM then SIGKILL signal sequence
steps.expected: SIGTERM sent before SIGKILL, both signals recorded
steps.observed: test_sigterm_then_sigkill_sequence PASSED: mocked os.killpg records signals_sent=[SIGTERM, SIGKILL], verified SIGTERM index < SIGKILL index

steps.action: Verify exit code on timeout is -1

relevantTests: test_timeout_captures_partial_output — 'echo partial && sleep 60' → partial in stdout
test_timeout_partial_stderr — 'echo err >&2 && sleep 60' → err in stderr
test_sigterm_then_sigkill_sequence — mocked killpg verifies SIGTERM before SIGKILL

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-HARNESS-06: LocalRunner executes subprocesses capturing stdout/stderr/exit_code, returns TaskResult with same interface as Docker runner (40 total tests cover basic execution, result parsing, working directory, lifecycle, interface compliance, harness integration). VAL-HARNESS-07: Timeout kills process with SIGTERM then SIGKILL, marks timed_out=True, captures partial output (6 dedicated timeout tests including mocked signal sequence verification). All 40 tests passed in 2.74s.
